heroHeadline: Peña Nieto: Structural Reforms, Ayotzinapa, and the Collapse of PRI Hegemony
heroSubtitle: Six years of sweeping reforms undercut by Ayotzinapa impunity, Casa Blanca corruption, record homicides, and the gasolinazo — ending in Mexico's most decisive electoral repudiation since 1994
footerNote: Data sourced from Diario Oficial, INEGI, CONEVAL, GIEI/IACHR, Proceso, Animal Político, Aristegui Noticias, MCCI, World Bank, Banxico, Transparency International
